landing.heroH1: Learn & Master UGC and get paid for it in Less than 30 Days
landing.heroSubRest: Master UGC and make money in less than 30 days!
landing.heroFor:
The UGC-30 online course is for anyone who wants to be a UGC and get paid by brands in exchange for content consistently in less than 30 days. Enjoy additional templates, webinars, simulators, checklists, scripts.

Get lifelong discounts on POV products at ZERO extra costs.

(originally 7,000 EGP).

Offer expires soon.

whoFor.title: Who is this online course for
whoFor.item1: This online course is for people who are committed to starting their content creation journey the right way.
whoFor.item2: This online course is for creators who are sick of being low-balled and skipped by brands.
whoFor.item3: This online course is for creators who are willing to bring in 50,000 EGP or 100,000 EGP in active monthly income from content.
whoFor.item4: This online course is for creators who are really passionate to someday travel the world creating content for brands.
whoFor.item5: This online course is for creators who want to build communities of active people that trust them.

whoNeed.title: Who are the creators that need this ?
whoNeed.item1: Creators who have been posting non stop but see no results.
whoNeed.item2: Creators who are passionate about content but find it so difficult to do so.
whoNeed.item3: Creators who fail to monetize because they think they are so small.
whoNeed.item4: Creators who are committed but can't present themselves properly to brands.
whoNeed.item5: Creators who want to never work a 9-5 ever again.
whoNeed.item6: Creators who believe content can change their lives.

whoNotFor.title: Who is this online course not for
whoNotFor.item1: This online course is not for people who are drowning in instant gratification. This is designed for progress, not for low quality output.
whoNotFor.item2: This online course is not for for people who are skeptical, condescending and/or inconsistent negatively impacting the community.
whoNotFor.item3: This online course is not for people who lack motivation to post, passion to create and/or commitment to stay consistent.

creatorsSection.title: Meet the creators behind this online course
creatorsSection.p1: Heyy! We are the team behind POV. A team that has been crazy about content ever since this company was born.
creatorsSection.p2: We have been studying, researching, teaching, preaching, and practicing the art of creating content for the past 3 years. We have created multiple products that best help content up their content creation game.
creatorsSection.p3: We have dealt closely with tens of thousands of content creators including nano creators, micro creators, macro influencers, mega influencers, celebrities, and UGC creators and have seen very much up close how they monetize and make a living for themselves.
creatorsSection.p4: Recently, we decided that we want to help everyone learn how to start creating content and monetize off of their content consistently month in & month out in less than in 90 days.
creatorsSection.p5: We can help you change your life forever and never ever need to work a 9-5 out of desperate financial need again.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Do I need to be at a certain level in terms of skills?
faq.a1: You do not need any kind of skills, but you need t bring hunger and commitment.
faq.a2: We are an Egyptian fully licensed enterprise that has served more than 135,000 people and an over 1M USD in sales revenue.
faq.q3: Will I need to pay for anything else rather than this one-time payment?
faq.a3: For all the value that you're getting and all the results that you'll see, we charge zero more EGPs.
faq.q4: How is this different than anything else that is free online?
faq.a4: We specialize in this. What is different is the mentorship, the details, the community, the customization and the tools we offer you.
faq.q5: How long will it take me to see results?
faq.a5: This is not magic. It's not empty promises. If you commit 100%, it will get you to active monthly income in less than 90 days.
faq.q6: For how long do I have access to mentorship? Is it forever?
faq.a6: You get access for as long as this system and program is alive.
faq.q7: Will I need to buy expensive equipments, tools & gadgets?
faq.a7: No, but even if you wanted to, you will have 10% discount on all content creation tools sold by POV.
